subcodes.first_line: O servant of the divine Threshold! Numerous Tablets have been revealed and dispatched to thee. These reveal the never-ending and ever-present favors
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم درگاه الهی مکاتیب متعدده مرقوم شد و ارسال گشت ای مظاهر لطف و عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
